Description: High vibration alarm triggered - vibration 8.9 mm/s
Corrective Action: Emergency lubrication applied - bearing replacement scheduled

Description: Segment bearing temperature reached 94 deg C during casting
Root Cause: Cooling water flow reduced due to blocked filter
Corrective Action: Filter replaced - cooling flow restored - bearing inspected

Equipment: Hot Strip Mill Work Roll Drive
Description: Hydraulic pressure dropped to 185 bar during rolling
Root Cause: Internal seal leak in hydraulic cylinder
Corrective Action: Seal kit replaced - pressure restored to 270 bar

Description: Pump motor overcurrent trip during heat 4
Corrective Action: MCB reset after phase checked - root cause: loose terminal

Description: Fan vibration increased to 7.2 mm/s - alarm triggered
Root Cause: Rotor imbalance due to dust buildup on blades
Corrective Action: Blades cleaned and balanced - vibration reduced to 2.1 mm/s

Description: Wire rope inspection found 12 broken wires in one lay
Root Cause: Fatigue wear - rope change due per schedule
Corrective Action: Wire rope replaced with new - proof load test completed

Description: Bearing failure - vibration reached 12.5 mm/s - shutdown
Root Cause: Progressive bearing wear not addressed - earlier alarm ignored
Corrective Action: Bearing replaced (SKF 22320 P/N B-2247) - alignment checked

Root Cause: Hydraulic pump wear - flow rate reduced 15%
Corrective Action: Pump replaced - system flushed and refilled

Equipment: Hot Strip Mill Work Roll Drive
Description: Oil analysis shows elevated iron particles (NAS 10)
Root Cause: Gear tooth wear - oil change interval exceeded
Corrective Action: Oil drained and replaced - filter changed - monitoring increased

Description: Encoder feedback fault - pusher stopped mid-cycle
Root Cause: Encoder coupling worn - intermittent signal loss
Corrective Action: Encoder and coupling replaced - cable routing improved
